name: Integration - End-to-End Query with Cache Miss and LLM Fallback
description: Tests the full workflow when a user query is not cached, triggers embedding, retrieval, business rules, and LLM fallback due to missing policy content.
input: POST /api/ask with user_input that does not match any policy content (e.g., 'What is the company’s spaceship policy?')
output: AgentResponseModel with fallback response indicating escalation to HR.
